project.name: ION TUI 仪表板
project.styleDefinitionBrief: AI Agent 编排平台终端仪表板，深色背景 + 青色强调，等宽字体，工业/实用主义风格，三栏布局模拟 TUI 界面
project.designRead: TUI dashboard / developer engineers / industrial terminal utilitarian / high density / avoid generic web dashboard

styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Monospace-only: JetBrains Mono / Fira Code / Consolas fallback. All text rendered in monospace font including labels and UI chrome.
styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Deep navy bg #0d1117, cyan accent #00d4aa, secondary text #8b949e, border #30363d. High-contrast terminal aesthetic.
styleContinuityAnchors.densityModel: Compact: 12-13px base font, tight line-height 1.25-1.5, minimal padding (8-12px panel gaps), max information density.
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeLanguage: Square/rectangular panels with thin 1px borders. No rounded corners on cards/panels. Sharp, precise, utilitarian.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Panel borders only (1px solid), no shadows on static surfaces. Box-shadow glow only on focused/active elements (accent color, low alpha).
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Keyboard-driven, minimal mouse interaction. Status indicators via Unicode symbols. Streaming cursor for active agents.

pages.title: 主面板
pages.visualNorthStar: Three-column TUI terminal layout: left workspace sidebar, center Agent conversation panel, right dashboard with TODO/process monitor/logs.

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Monospace-only: JetBrains Mono / Fira Code / Consolas fallback.
continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Deep navy bg #0d1117, cyan accent #00d4aa, secondary text #8b949e, border #30363d.
continuityAnchors.densityModel: Compact: 12-13px base font, tight line-height, minimal padding.

pages.title: 看板视图
pages.visualNorthStar: Kanban board with equal-sized draggable Worker cards in a grid. Left sidebar preserved, right sidebar hidden. Bottom message stream + input bar. Cards show Agent type, status, uptime, worktree info, project ownership, and hierarchy (main/sub/peer agent). Selected card highlights with accent border + glow. Double-click hint for detail view.
pages.compositionPattern: Two-zone layout: top area = left sidebar (220px, same as main-panel) + kanban grid (fill remaining); bottom area = message stream + input bar (fixed height ~200px). Cards in CSS Grid with 3-4 columns, equal size, draggable appearance (grab cursor, subtle lift shadow on hover).

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Monospace-only: JetBrains Mono / Fira Code / Consolas fallback. All text rendered in monospace font.
continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Deep navy bg #0d1117, cyan accent #00d4aa, secondary text #8b949e, border #30363d.
continuityAnchors.densityModel: Compact: 12-13px base font. Cards packed with info labels (agent type, status, uptime, worktree, project, hierarchy) in tight rows.
continuityAnchors.shapeLanguage: Square/rectangular cards with thin 1px borders. No rounded corners. Drag handle indicators.
